parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ post_info: { title: ($json.title || '').substring(0, 150), privacy_level: 'SELF_ONLY' }, source_info: { source: 'FILE_UPLOAD', video_size: $binary.clipBinary.fileSize, chunk_size: 10485760, total_chunk_count: Math.ceil($binary.clipBinary.fileSize / 10485760) } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ snippet: { title: ($json.title || '').substring(0, 100), description: ($json.description || '') + '\n\n#Shorts', tags: (() => { try { return JSON.parse($json.hashtags || '[]').map(h => String(h).replace('#', '')); } catch(e) { return []; } })() }, status: { privacyStatus: 'private' } }) }}
